change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Programs, broadsides, coupons, magazines, schedules, and other ephemera and written material pertaining to the 1994 Gay Games in New York City, especially the women's ice hockey and martial arts competitions.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Gay Games 94 participant, member of the Washington DC Mighty Dykes ice hockey team, and martial arts participant.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Programs, broadsides, coupons, magazines, schedules, and other ephemera and written material pertaining to the 1994 Gay Games in New York City, especially the women's ice hockey and martial arts competitions.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: Scott Chesney's Gay Games and Stonewall 25 March memorabilia, #7583Arthur S. Leonard's Gay Games and Stonewall 25 celebration memorabilia, #7585

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Barbara Neal's Gay Games memorabilia, #7584. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Official Guide to Lesbian and Gay Pride and History Month 1994--New York Pride Guide
Out from the Bar Raids, On to the Legal Battles: Lesbian and Gay Civil Rights in the aftermath of the Stonewall Riots, The Association of the Bar of the City of New York (Thursday, June 23, 1994)
Gay Games New York 1994, assorted papers and correspondence, English and German
Gay Games IV and Cultural Festival--official program--collector's edition
The Gay Games Guide--The Official Guide to all Gay Games IV and Cultural Festival Events
